subject: Using links
body:
Dear Dimitry,

many thanks for Warp - its fantastic and we use it regularly. 

For data storage we like to confine folders to either large or small files 
- which works quite well if we generate links in our processing directory 
pointing at an isolated Raw-Data folder. 
Warp has no problem in seeing the links and also processing the files 
correctly - however, it does not recognize if new links are added. 
Therefore, we cannot before on-the-fly-processing anymore. 

The way we are using it is that we have a script moving the raw-mics from 
the scope to the main storage and automatically generating a link for every 
new file once it has fully appeared on the storage. 

Right now we have to regularly restart Warp - actually we to "fake-change" 
a parameter in addition - in order for Warp to see the new images 
appearing. 

I am happy to provide more information if necessary.


Your help would be greatly appreciated,

many thanks
cheers
Arne



MPI-Biophysics Frankfurt
